description_long: This is a wooden mallet with a cylindrical head and a long, smoothly contoured handle. The head is robust and features subtle carved decorative patterns along its sides, giving it a traditional and somewhat ornate appearance. The handle is gently tapered, rounded, and appears ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, with a slight bulge at the end to prevent slipping. The wood has a polished, glossy finish, highlighting its rich brown color and natural grain. There are no visible metal parts, and the entire object appears to be crafted from a single type of wood. The mallet is in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear, damage, or branding.
description: A polished wooden mallet with a cylindrical, ornately carved head and a smoothly contoured handle. The finish is glossy and the object appears pristine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the mallet, highlighting the cylindrical head with carved details and the smoothly tapered handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, showing its rounded tip and the circular face of the mallet head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the full mallet profile and the decorative carvings on the head.
description_view_3: Head-on view of the mallet's striking face, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and carved patterns.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden, smoothly contoured handle with a gentle taper and rounded end, polished and ergonomic for grip.
attribute_head_type: Cylindrical wooden mallet head with carved decorative patterns, featuring two flat striking faces.

license_info.creator_display_name: Ruth Lilly Medical Library, IU School of Medicine
